info.title: GeoAI API
info.description: Backend API for GeoAI spatial search and visualization.

schema.title: Response Logout Api Auth Logout Post

post.description:
空间查询

Args:
    query: 空间查询参数

Returns:
    空间查询结果

地理编码（地址转坐标）

Args:
    address: 地址
    city: 城市

Returns:
    地理编码结果

逆地理编码（坐标转地址）

Args:
    lon: 经度
    lat: 纬度

Returns:
    逆地理编码结果

get.description:
创建缓冲区

Args:
    lon: 经度
    lat: 纬度
    distance: 缓冲距离（米）

Returns:
    缓冲区几何对象（GeoJSON）

post.description:
计算几何对象交集

Args:
    geometry1: 第一个几何对象（GeoJSON）
    geometry2: 第二个几何对象（GeoJSON）

Returns:
    交集几何对象（GeoJSON）

get.description:
计算两点间距离

Args:
    lon1, lat1: 第一个点坐标
    lon2, lat2: 第二个点坐标

Returns:
    距离（米）
测试端点：验证路由注册

获取所有省级行政区划数据（GeoJSON FeatureCollection格式）

使用PostGIS的ST_AsGeoJSON和ST_Simplify函数查询spatial_regions表
返回符合GeoJSON标准的FeatureCollection，前端可直接解析

Args:
    simplify: 简化容差，单位为度（经纬度）。例如0.001约等于100米。默认0.001以提升前端性能。

Returns:
    GeoJSON FeatureCollection

parameters.name: simplify

schema.description: 几何简化容差（度），0表示不简化
schema.title: Simplify

parameters.description: 几何简化容差（度），0表示不简化

ChatHistoryMessage.title: ChatHistoryMessage
ChatHistoryMessage.description: Client-provided conversation history allowed in search requests.

DocumentBatchResult.title: DocumentBatchResult
DocumentBatchResult.description: 单个文档批量操作结果

download_available.title: Download Available
download_available.description: Whether the original file can be downloaded.

FeedbackRequest.title: FeedbackRequest
FeedbackRequest.description: Feedback payload for a search result.

FeedbackResponse.title: FeedbackResponse
FeedbackResponse.description: Response returned after feedback has been persisted.

id.title: Id
id.description: Document identifier shown to the user.

title.title: Title
title.description: Document title shown to the user.

rank.title: Rank
rank.description: 1-based rank from the previous assistant reply.

FollowUpCandidateDocument.title: FollowUpCandidateDocument
FollowUpCandidateDocument.description: A candidate document that can be referenced by a follow-up question.

candidate_documents.title: Candidate Documents
candidate_documents.description: Candidate documents from the previous assistant response.

resolution_source.title: Resolution Source
resolution_source.description: How the client resolved the follow-up target.

FollowUpContext.title: FollowUpContext
FollowUpContext.description: Client-provided context for document-specific follow-up questions.

use_generation.title: Use Generation
use_generation.description: Whether to generate a natural-language answer.

follow_up_context.description: Optional document follow-up context resolved on the client.
